creator: skreuzer@exit2shell.com
text:
This might be because RT is not able to find the binaries for graphwiz  
even if they are installed.
Can you try the following:

Edit the file /usr/local/bin/webmux.pl and change line 52 from

$ENV{'PATH'}   = '/bin:/usr/bin';

to

$ENV{'PATH'}   = '/bin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/bin';

Please let me know if this works for you.  If so, I will create a  
patch and
commit it.

Thanks

--
Steven Kreuzer
http://www.exit2shell.com/~skreuzer
